arts.ttl: Kompany reveals Kimmich will "probably" miss Stuttgart trip
arts.sum: FC Bayern coach Vincent Kompany has confirmed that Joshua Kimmich is unlikely to be included in the squad to face Stuttgart on Friday.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich withdraw contract offer for Joshua Kimmich
arts.sum: According to Bild, Bayern Munich have withdrawn their contract offer for Joshua Kimmich. It is understood that the 30-year-old’s deal at the Allianz Arena is set to expire this summer,…

arts.ttl: Bundesliga duties call before Bayern, Leverkusen clash on Europe's big stage
arts.sum: Frankfurt aims to hold on to third place after its 4-0 loss at Bayern last weekend, and Stuttgart is looking for its first win in three games to revive its hopes of reaching fourth place, the last for Champions League qualification. — Both Stuttgart — against Bayern — and Frankfurt — against Leverkusen — will be highly motivated with their own Champions League qualifications at stake.

arts.ttl: Happy anniversary Bayern Munich: 125 years and a simple secret for success | Philipp Lahm
arts.sum: My boyhood club is shaped by Franz Beckenbauer’s legacy, and for the last half-century has been run by former players I congratulate my club on its anniversary. On Thursday, Bayern Munich will be 125 years old. The club was in my cradle, because my grandfather was and my father is a Bayern fan. When I was young, they told me a lot about the golden 70s with the three European Cup victories. They admired Gerd Müller, Sepp Maier and the other players. They were almost in awe of one of them: Franz Beckenbauer. In the beginning, Bayern were one of many clubs. I have a few black-and-white pictures from the founding days in mind; I know the club history. But I can only really talk about it from the Beckenbauer era onwards, and since then Bayern have been something very special. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich would need a “miracle” for Joshua Kimmich to feature against VfB Stuttgart
arts.sum: According to kicker, Bayern Munich will be without Joshua Kimmich when they face VfB Stuttgart on Friday evening. It had previously been reported that the 30-year-old would be a doubt…

arts.ttl: Report: Amid interest from MLS, Bayern Munich’s Thomas Müller could return next season with reduced role and lower salary; talks expected soon
arts.sum: MLS clubs are already trying to tempt Müller, just like other Bayern greats Gerd Müller and Franz Beckenbauer who played in the US at the end of their careers. Bayern Munich legend Thomas Müller will have to make a tough decision very soon — to retire, to move on from Bayern Munich, or to stick around one more year at the only club he has ever known.

arts.ttl: Hoeness' comments prompt Bayern to speed up talks with Müller
arts.sum: Uli Hoeness recently made a very honest statement about Thomas Müller's future - and it seems the Bayern honorary president's comments have led to talks with the 35-year-old becoming a higher priority.

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Man Utd step up Kane pursuit; Barcelona explore Nunez move
arts.sum: Thursday's football transfer rumours, with updates on Harry Kane, Darwin Nunez, Frenkie de Jong, Casemiro, Mohamed Salah & more.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Spurs among Premier League clubs keen on £20m defender who Vincent Kompany has deemed 'incredible'
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively confirm what Taylor Harwood-Bellis has decided to do this summer amid links with the likes of Tottenham Hotspur, Aston Villa and...

arts.ttl: Daizen Maeda blows Bayern minds as Carter Vickers reveals why Celtic live wire is talk of the Allianz Arena
arts.sum: The Hoops defender had some spies in the German camp and they lifted the lid on what they made of the red hot Hoops star
